items.name: <![CDATA[Show HN: StartupWiki – A Free Alternative to Crunchbase]]>
items.summary: I've been building StartupWiki, a free startup database designed to make it easier to discover and research companies.The original motivation was frustration with how difficult it can be to find information on early-stage startups. Most databases need accounts, or subscriptions, ro just feel too cluttered.
